problem: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience?
mechanism: Vagus nerve stimulation modulating brain-gut axis
hypothesis: The key to What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience? is Vagus nerve stimulation modulating brain-gut axis — specifically Vagus nerve stimulation — which would help 8,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 17 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
